articles.title: New bodycam footage shows Henry Nowak killer's arrest and repeated lies to police
articles.description: Henry Nowak's killer is seen lying to police in bodycam video released after a request from the BBC.

articles.title: King becomes first monarch to reveal tax bill as royal public funding to double to £100m
articles.description: New figures show the monarch paid £12.9m in tax last year, but do not give any detailed breakdown of how that tax was calculated.

articles.title: King and Queen will not live in Buckingham Palace after renovations
articles.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla will continue to reside in Clarence House, Buckingham Palace says.

articles.title: Watch: Driver gives lift to armed officer chasing suspect
articles.description: The chase was caught on camera as the motorist pulled over to help in Margate.
